title: Recover Python stream framing
description: Recover KISS oversized-buffer resynchronization, KISS bridge task ownership, APRS field bounds, and SLIP overflow-delimiter recovery. Rewrite assertion-free checkpoint tests.
acceptance_criteria: No bytes are lost across valid KISS boundaries; shutdown leaves no tasks; oversized SLIP/KISS input recovers at the next delimiter; APRS fields are fixed-width; focused tests and three reviews pass.
